summary: Added Jest test suites for checkout.js (16 tests, Stripe) and cryptoCheckout.js (21 tests, BTC/LN/BTCPay) with full mocking — all 314 tests pass with 0 failures

commits_made: 1dcf7b3 - test(payment): add Jest suites for checkout.js and cryptoCheckout.js
context_for_next_worker.approach_used: Mocked all heavy dependencies (stripe, sqlite3/databaseHelper, orderService, emailService, express-rate-limit) using jest.mock() at the top of each test file; used supertest for HTTP-level testing.
context_for_next_worker.what_worked: Mock express-rate-limit to passthrough in tests; use jest.fn().mockReturnValue in beforeEach to re-initialize mocks after clearAllMocks(); re-set btcpayService.verifyWebhookSignature and lookupBookPrice defaults in beforeEach.
context_for_next_worker.what_didnt: jest.isolateModulesAsync with jest.mock() inside corrupts global mock registry — do not use. Buffer payloads with Content-Type application/json in supertest get serialized as {type:'Buffer',data:[...]} JSON — always send string payloads for raw-body webhook tests.
context_for_next_worker.next_recommended_step: Only remaining active tasks are 001-P2-fix-stripe-lazy-init-race-condition.md and 002-P2-add-structured-logging.md — both appear to be small focused fixes.
